title: passing an interface to a non-interface port causes internal error

features.name: interface to logic port connection error
features.description: Code should include an interface type being connected to a non-interface (logic) port in a module instantiation

features.name: empty interface declaration
features.description: Code should include an empty interface declaration with no members

features.name: module with logic input port
features.description: Code should include a module with a simple logic input port (non-interface type)
